notes: Lane ownership complete: read-only local Kanboard discovery and non-secret adapter assumptions. Detected system package kanboard 1.2.47-1 with /usr/share/webapps/kanboard and /etc/webapps/kanboard/config.php; cron/timer units exist, no container rows, no reachable base URL at 127.0.0.1 or /kanboard. Adapter should read KANBOARD_BASE_URL/KANBOARD_JSONRPC_ENDPOINT/KANBOARD_PROJECT_ID/KANBOARD_API_USER/KANBOARD_API_TOKEN/KANBOARD_API_AUTH_HEADER from env/config; no secrets emitted and no Kanboard mutation attempted.

items.title: Identify local Kanboard service/package/container without exposing secrets
